_comment: Skill Governor catalog. Filesystem (~/.claude/skills/ vs ~/.claude/skills-inactive/) is the source of truth for active state. This file is a catalog: aliases, descriptions, protected list. Used by skill-use for alias resolution and skill-disable for the protected list.

caveman.description: Ultra-compressed response mode. Levels: lite (default), full, ultra.

example-skill.description: Example catalog entry showing the full schema.
